buyPlan.trigger: Use only the first orderly pullback to VWAP or breakout support; skip repeated VWAP breaks.

sellPlan.targetTime: Next trading day 09:30-10:00; sell before 10:00 unless it quickly seals limit-up.
sellPlan.strategy: Target the T+1 morning impulse after a mid-stage trend confirmation; take 3%+ quickly, only stronger front-row shapes aim for 5%-9%.
sellPlan.timeWindow: Next trading day 09:30-10:00; sell before 10:00 unless it quickly seals limit-up.

rules: Next morning weak open and cannot reclaim the late-session platform
Break the personalized stop or the 14:00 entry trigger
Avoid widening the stop after purchase

board: Morning top candidate is evaluated by stock shape
stock: [AM_TOP] Early morning front-row setup
Board is hot enough for morning acceleration
Morning acceleration gain zone is matched
Price holds the early high platform
Price holds above VWAP
Turnover can support early board capture
Volume is active without obvious exhaustion
Main or super capital is net inflow
Deal amount supports fast T+1 exit
Open has enough upward spread

buyPlan.trigger: At 09:26 only watch or queue after auction confirmation; after 09:40 use only if it is still open or resealing.

sellPlan.targetTime: Next trading day 09:30-10:00; sell before 10:00 unless the board remains sealed.
sellPlan.strategy: AM_TOP setup: catch the next-morning premium after 09:31-09:38 front-row acceleration; after 09:40 only monitor seal strength or reseal.
sellPlan.timeWindow: Next trading day 09:30-10:00; sell before 10:00 unless the board remains sealed.

rules: Morning top weakens and fails to reseal or hold the high platform
Break the personalized stop or fall back under VWAP with volume
09:26 is a watch/queue signal; 09:31-09:38 is the primary execution window
Do not chase after 09:40 unless it is an unsealed front-row reseal
